Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY SECONDARY
Skill: 1H Slashing Atk Delay: 24
DMG: 7 Dmg Bonus: 35
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
WT: 5.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: WAR PAL RNG SHD BRD ROG
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

ack

# Aug 09 2003 at 9:06 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593362391798
View User Forum
4 posts
Is there a special forge for making the folded sheets of adamantite? I've tried one large block, I've tried 3 large blocks with the neriak nectar and no combine. Help?
▲ Page top
Blacksmithing For Dummies...
QuoteReply
# Aug 07 2002 at 3:17 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592759583282
Scholar
114 posts
Can anyone tell me how to get a folded sheet of Adamantite? I'm guessing I'll have to forge it myself, but if that's right could someone please tell me the ingredients and where to get them? I've only just started blacksmithing and need all the help I can get!
Thanks...
▲ Page top
These are mob dropped too.
QuoteReply
# Apr 03 2001 at 9:38 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592245653456
8 posts
I get a pair of these of a Dark Elf mob in the Kithicor Forest. He as red to me at 52, and his name escapes me right now. He is not listed in the Bestiary section. We killed 4 other mobs there last night that aren't in the database. One was a "War Mistress of" somthing. Anyway, this is the first time I have seen player crafted item drop from NPC's.

Draylon <Zizzer>
Bard of Tunare

▲ Page top
RE: These are mob dropped too.
QuoteReply
# Apr 07 2001 at 9:53 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592247739301
14 posts
His name is Brigadier Adjunct. He is a level 60 mob that is a very rare spawn in kithicor Forest. He dual wields two indigo sabres. I have heard that it would take two level 60 groups to tackle em on since he hits four times at once for 250dmg each hit. To wield these sabres knowing they came from this mob is a great feeling. To own a pair knowing they were crafted is nice but there is no history behind em. It would be nice in this instance to somehow identify through a spell or the right click what items were crafted and what items were dropped.
Mine were handed down warrior to warrior. Not bad considering some history was given of the fight for these decent sabres.
▲ Page top
RE: These are mob dropped too.
QuoteReply
# Dec 29 2003 at 12:02 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591798168288
50 posts
um, we downed him with a 63sk a 65 cleric me a 47 mage a 59 mage a 61 rogue and a 55 druid and no one even came close to dieing (after we single pulled em of course poor SK died like 5 times single pulling)
▲ Page top
RE: These are mob dropped too.
QuoteReply
# Aug 31 2002 at 8:55 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591770675717
79 posts
killed him couple nites ago with 3 groups in low to mid 50s dropped two sabres and a two handed sword.

179 posts
OMG U ppl are 2 hilarious, this is the group of mobs for the finish of the Rogue Epic

# Dec 14 2003 at 12:29 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591773994568
Guru
658 posts
Not only are they for the Rogue epic, the entire houseful of DEs and their undead guards can be done with a single group of 65s.
▲ Page top
Neriak Nectar component.
QuoteReply
# Jan 10 2001 at 8:00 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
One of the components used to forge this is supposed to be Neriak Nectar. Does anyone have any info on where this comes from? Is it a foraged item? Foraged in Nektulos forest? Foraged in Neriak itself? I've spent time in both Nektulos and Neriak foraging with my wood elf with no luck foraging this and have not seen it sold on a vendor. Any confirmed info on where to get the Nectar would be most appreciated.
▲ Page top
RE: Neriak Nectar component.
QuoteReply
# Jan 12 2001 at 3:15 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Neriak Nectar comes from a vendor in the 3rd Gate of Neriak, in a place called Maidens Fancy from Cecile KJartan.
▲ Page top
RE: Neriak Nectar component.
QuoteReply
# Jan 13 2001 at 7:10 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Found her and the Nectar. Thanks for the response. : )
▲ Page top
Usable by Class?
QuoteReply
# Dec 20 2000 at 1:46 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591749956383
14 posts
The description claims SHD WAR ROG only... the SS includes PAL RNG BRD as well. Which is right? Was it changed recently, perhaps? I was wanting one of these for my Ranger (for RP purposes), but will I be able to use it?
▲ Page top
RE: Usable by Class?
QuoteReply
# Feb 11 2001 at 5:11 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
The picture is correct. I made one just now (Feb 11, 2001) and it is WAR PAL RNG SHD BRD ROG.
▲ Page top
RE: Usable by Class?
QuoteReply
# Feb 11 2001 at 5:14 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Oh just to clarify - the race / class listed in the text here are for the imbued version. The normal version isn't restricted to Innoruuk worshippers.
